title: Reasons in order
subtitle: Give more than one reason.
overview: A2 Bridge turns short A1 sentences into connected, useful English. Read aloud, understand the Chinese, then make your own sentence.

sections.title: A2 bridge focus
rows: First, it is cheaper. Second, it is closer.
第一，它更便宜。第二，它更近。
The main reason is that I need more practice.
主要原因是我需要更多练习。
Why do you like this place?
你为什么喜欢这个地方？
First, it is quiet. Second, the coffee is good.
第一，它很安静。第二，咖啡很好。

items.en: First, it is cheaper. Second, it is closer.
items.zh: 第一，它更便宜。第二，它更近。

items.en: The main reason is that I need more practice.
items.zh: 主要原因是我需要更多练习。

items.en: Why do you like this place?
items.zh: 你为什么喜欢这个地方？

items.en: First, it is quiet. Second, the coffee is good.
items.zh: 第一，它很安静。第二，咖啡很好。

items.en: This sentence helps me speak a little longer.
items.zh: 这个句子帮助我说得稍微长一点。

items.en: I can change the details and make it true for my life.
items.zh: 我可以改变细节，让它符合我的真实生活。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Why do you like this place?
lines.zh: 你为什么喜欢这个地方？

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: First, it is quiet. Second, the coffee is good.
lines.zh: 第一，它很安静。第二，咖啡很好。

lines.speaker: A
lines.en: Can you add one more detail?

lines.speaker: B
lines.en: The main reason is that I need more practice.
lines.zh: 主要原因是我需要更多练习。

items.en: First, it is cheaper. Second, it is closer.
items.zh: 第一，它更便宜。第二，它更近。

items.en: The main reason is that I need more practice.
items.zh: 主要原因是我需要更多练习。

items.en: Now say the same idea with your own real details.
items.zh: 现在用你自己的真实细节说同一个意思。

items.en: Repeat it until it feels clear and natural.
items.zh: 重复它，直到感觉清楚又自然。
